ham.subject: Your Weekly Exclusive Deals Are Here - Shop Now!
ham.body:
Hello John,

I hope you’re doing great! This week, we’re thrilled to bring you a curated selection of top products just for you. From the latest tech gadgets to stylish home décor, our exclusive deals are designed to add value to your everyday life.

What’s on offer this week?
- 30% off on smartwatches and wearables
- Buy 1 Get 1 Free on premium kitchenware
- Limited edition accessories at a special price

Simply visit our store and use the promo code WELCOME30 at checkout to enjoy these savings.

Thank you for being a valued customer. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team.

Happy shopping!

Best regards,

The XYZ Team

spam.subject: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet has been suspended due to suspicious activity. To restore access, you must verify your account within 24 hours. Failure to comply will result in permanent account closure.

Please click the link below to verify your details:
<URL>

Your security is our priority. If you suspect any unauthorized activity, contact us immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Support Team

Note: This is an automated message. Do not reply to this email.
